User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the RutaRápida Pro system, acting as either a driver or an administrator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for authentication and contact.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

role.description: The role of the user within the system, determining their access and functionality.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user's profile was last updated.

DriverProfile.title: DriverProfile
DriverProfile.description: Contains additional profile information specific to a user with the 'Driver' role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DriverProfile entity, which is also the User ID. (Relationship: User 1:1 DriverProfile)

userId.description: Reference to the associated User entity. (Relationship: User 1:1 DriverProfile)

vehicleId.description: Reference to the Vehicle currently assigned to this driver. (Relationship: DriverProfile 1:N Vehicle)

currentLocationLat.description: The current latitude of the driver's location.

currentLocationLng.description: The current longitude of the driver's location.

lastLocationUpdate.description: Timestamp of the last known location update for the driver.

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: Represents a community or driver-generated alert about road conditions or incidents.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Alert entity.

type.description: The category or type of the alert (e.g., 'trafico', 'policia', 'sos').

label.description: A user-friendly label for the alert type (e.g., 'Tráfico', 'Control').

description.description: A detailed description of the alert or incident reported.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of where the alert was reported.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of where the alert was reported.

authorId.description: Reference to the User ID who created this alert. (Relationship: User 1:N Alert)

status.description: The current status of the alert (e.g., 'Active', 'Resolved').

likes.description: An array of User IDs who have 'liked' this alert. (Relationship: User N:N Alert)

participantIds.description: An array of User IDs who are participating in or monitoring this alert. (Relationship: User N:N Alert)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the alert was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the alert was last updated or had activity.

AlertMessage.title: AlertMessage
AlertMessage.description: A message sent within a community alert context.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a delivery or logistics request that needs to be fulfilled by a driver.

/alerts/{alertId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores messages related to a specific community alert.
